CustomField.label: Auto Generated
CustomField.description: True when this Work Order was created by NEPA_Work_Order_Generator as part of GIS-driven team assembly. Enables idempotency: on GIS re-run, NEPA_Team_Assembly_Orchestrator cancels existing auto-generated Work Orders before creating new ones, while leaving manually created Work Orders untouched. Also used as trigger condition by NEPA_WO_Milestone_Setter to fire discipline-specific Action Plan Templates.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Checked when this Work Order was auto-created from a GIS protection layer detection. Unchecked for manually created Work Orders.
